sentences.text: Hello, and thank you for calling Fairfield residential. If you know your party's four, digit extension you may dial it now, otherwise please remain on the line for more options. Please choose from the following menu options for a directory of names, please press one. If you're a resident or vendor partner at one of our Fairfield community press two. If you're Fairfield associate and would like to speak with human resources press three for corporate departments press four, if you need help getting to the appropriate associate press five or to repeat these options please press zero. And valid entry, please choose from the following menu options for a directory of names, please press one. If you're a resident or vendor partner at one of our Fairfield community press two. If you're Fairfield associate and would like to speak with if you know your party's extension you may dial it at any time. Otherwise remain on the line for a directory. Enter the first few letters of the person's last name for the letter, Q use the seven key for the letter Z use the nine key please enter the letters now. For for Cara Adams press two to reenter the name press the pound key to leave the directory transferring to Cara Adams at extension eight. One eight zero one moment please. Hello, you have reached Tara Adam with Fairfield residential. I'm sorry, I missed your call. Please leave a message and I'll get back to you as soon
